subcodes.first_line: O Jalál! Upon thee be the glory of God, Lord of the Beginning and the End! Thy letters have reached Us repeatedly, and this servant hath attained unto the presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلال علیک بهاء الله مالک المبدء و المال نامه ات مکرر رسید و عبد حاضر تلقاء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
